text: I think the government's migration policy is wrong and we should debate it in parliament.
Politicians are all liars and idiots, every single one of them.
These people will never change, it is in their nature. You cannot trust a single one.
Anyone who talks to the other community is a traitor and a sell-out.
Migrants are flooding our schools and bringing disease. They do not belong here.
If we let them build their place of worship here it will be the end of our village, a catastrophe.
Of course the journalist defends them, she is paid by foreign masters to write this.
They are vermin and should be driven out of our neighbourhoods once and for all.
I saw a rude joke about my town's football team and people are angry.
Do not even discuss their version of history in class, there is nothing to discuss.
